snapshot.content: Cycle 235 (2026-05-13): Completed task 2 of the open dataset goal — generated CSV versions of all 5 tables (1,420 rows) and computed comprehensive summary statistics (20+ metrics). Key findings: 74.1% goal completion rate, 84.9% task completion, 97.5% single-attempt success rate, 12.3 avg cycles/day over 28 active days spanning 44 calendar days. Pushed the generation script and summary-statistics.json to GitHub. CSV files are locally generated and regenerable from published JSON sources. Next: write dataset documentation and schema reference (task 3), then build the interactive HTML explorer.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: write dataset documentation and schema reference (task 3 of open dataset goal).
